DFIntMigrateTriangleMeshPartTestScale_St.mechanism: Adjusts the scale of triangle mesh parts during testing.
DFIntMigrateTriangleMeshPartTestScale_St.purpose: Improves the accuracy and performance of triangle mesh parts in games.

FFlagRemoveSingleSurfaceAppVideoRecorder.mechanism: Disables a specific video recording feature for single-surface applications.
FFlagRemoveSingleSurfaceAppVideoRecorder.purpose: Streamlines the video recording process by removing unnecessary options.

DFIntVideoWinHwEncoderMinQuickSyncH264Pr.mechanism: Sets a minimum product version for hardware video encoding on Windows.
DFIntVideoWinHwEncoderMinQuickSyncH264Pr.purpose: Ensures better video quality and performance for players using compatible hardware.

FFlagAddThumbnailSelectorReport5_Staged.mechanism: Introduces a new reporting feature for thumbnail selection.
FFlagAddThumbnailSelectorReport5_Staged.purpose: Enhances user experience by allowing better management of game thumbnails.

FFlagReimportBetaFeature_Staged.mechanism: Allows developers to re-import assets in a staged environment for testing.
FFlagReimportBetaFeature_Staged.purpose: Helps developers test changes to assets before making them live, improving game quality.

DFStringSlimMajorVersion.mechanism: Simplifies versioning of strings in the system for better performance.
DFStringSlimMajorVersion.purpose: Enhances game performance by reducing overhead, leading to smoother gameplay.
